description: Proposed active-role list for the project plus a short summary.

roles.description: Role-tags from the menu. At least one surface role required (typically backend, frontend, mobile, or data).

summary.description: 2–4 sentences describing the overall shape of this project and why these roles were picked together.

example.summary: Standard web app: React SPA, REST API, containerised deploy. Backend serves user data and business logic; frontend renders the UI; devops handles compose and CI; testing covers unit and integration. No mobile, no heavy data analytics — normal CRUD plus auth is the scope.
